name: PointInsidePolygon
description: Finds the pole of inaccessibility (polylabel) for a polygon — the deepest interior point from the boundary. Falls back to centroid only when polylabel is unavailable.

inputParameters.name: polygon
inputParameters.description: Closed planar polygon curve to be processed.

outputParameters.name: interiorPoint
outputParameters.description: Resultant point guaranteed to be inside the polygon.
